---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for IRIS 365
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Module Affected

Which module does this relate to? (e.g., Transit, Canteen, Library, Hostel, Gate, Director Dashboard, AI, etc.)

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case. Who benefits and how?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
